name: iShares Ethereum Trust ETF
business: iShares Ethereum Trust ETF is a Delaware statutory trust that issues shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in its net assets, which consist primarily of ether. The Trust seeks to reflect the performance of the price of ether before expenses. Shares are listed on NASDAQ under ETHA and can be bought and sold through traditional brokerage accounts.
sellsTo: Investors seeking exposure to ether without direct holding
namedSuppliers: The Bank of New York Mellon

exposures.sentence: The Trust seeks to reflect generally the performance of the price of ether.
